title.en: Chat is for exploration. Work is for finishing.
title.zh: Chat 用来探索，Work 用来完成

description.en: Conversations are great for understanding problems, but real work has an objective, an environment, and a delivery. Cradle Work is a new concept built for finishing.
description.zh: 对话擅长帮你理解问题，但真正的工作有目标、有环境、有交付。Cradle Work 是为"完成"而生的新概念。

title.en: Session Await: agents that know how to wait
title.zh: Session Await：让 Agent 学会等待

description.en: Your agent pushed a PR and it's waiting for CI — but you don't have to wait with it. Session Await suspends a session on a condition and resumes it the moment the condition fires.
description.zh: Agent 推完 PR 之后在等 CI——但你不必陪着等。Session Await 让会话挂起在条件上，条件满足时自动继续。

title.en: Run four agents on the same codebase. At the same time.
title.zh: 在同一个代码库上同时跑四个 Agent

description.en: Love Claude Code? Run four of them. Cradle orchestrates every agent as a parallel worker — each with its own task, kanban card, and live status, none of them tripping over each other.
description.zh: 喜欢 Claude Code？那就跑四个。Cradle 把每个 agent 编排成并行的工作者——各自有任务、有看板卡片、有实时状态，互不干扰。

title.en: Conversation Bridge: keep your agent sessions going from Slack
title.zh: Conversation Bridge：在 Slack 里继续你的 Agent 会话

description.en: Conversation Bridge connects external conversation platforms to Cradle Chat Sessions, so work doesn't have to stop at the desktop window. The first Bridge plugin supports Slack.
description.zh: Conversation Bridge 把外部对话平台接入 Cradle 的 Chat Session，让工作不必停留在桌面窗口里。第一个 Bridge 插件支持 Slack。

title.en: Cradle dev builds are open for testing

description.en: After roughly two months of development, the first public dev build of Cradle Desktop is available. Here's what we're testing and where the current edges are.
description.zh: 经过约两个月的开发，Cradle Desktop 的第一个公开开发版本正式开放测试。这篇文章介绍了我们想验证什么，以及当前的边界在哪里。
